name: bench-telemetry
description: ESP32 bench telemetry: firmware, backend, UI, simulator.

scripts.dev:backend: cross-env NODE_ENV=development EMBED_BROKER=true INFLUX_DISABLED=true PORT=3000 npm --workspace backend run dev
scripts.dev:sim: wait-on tcp:1883 && npm --workspace simulator run sim
scripts.build: npm run build:ui && npm run build:backend
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=production EMBED_BROKER=true INFLUX_DISABLED=true npm --workspace backend run start
scripts.test: npm --workspace backend test && npm --workspace ui test && npm --workspace simulator test
